33

--- PAGE 34 ---
PART VII: ISSUANCE CONDITIONS AND PROCEDURE
Reservations
sentence_window:
(1) The issuer shall decide the issue price, in consultation with the lead manager(s), before
determining the record date, which shall be determined in consultation with the designated stock
exchange. (2) The issue price shall not be less than the face value of the specified securities. (3) The issuer shall disclose the issue price in the letter of offer filed with the Board and the stock
exchange(s).
33

--- PAGE 34 ---
PART VII: ISSUANCE CONDITIONS AND PROCEDURE
Reservations 74. (1) The issuer shall make a rights issue of equity shares only if it has made reservation of
equity shares of the same class in favour of the holders of outstanding compulsorily convertible
debt instruments, if any, in proportion to the convertible part thereof.
